{{Quote|You know, it's been over a century since I killed a Jedi, and today I get to kill four of you. Add that to the Gungans I already murdered, the hostages I'm going to kill later, and all the Naboo who will die tomorrow, and it's a damn good week.|Durge|<ref name="SWR51">[[Republic 51|''Republic'' 51]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Ohma-D'un''' or '''Defense of Naboo''' was a small-scale battle that took place roughly ten weeks after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]].

==Background==
When the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] lost contact with a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] colony on one of Naboo's moons, [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] sent a squad of four [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to investigate. This team consisted of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], Master [[Glaive (Jedi)|Glaive]], and [[Zule Xiss]]. To stay unnoticed, the team flew to the moon in a single [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|gunship]].

They quickly found what had become of the Gungan colony. Every single Gungan had died of a mysterious [[Swamp gas|chemical weapon]], which was created by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. The Jedi were infected by the poison, but luckily its effects took longer to work on non-Gungans.

==The skirmish==
[[File:Defenseofnaboo2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|The Jedi encounter Asajj Ventress.]]
The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] soon encountered [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|Ohma-D'un super battle droids]], [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] and the bounty hunter [[Durge/Legends|Durge]], and attacked them. The [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] were all killed by Durge except for the single [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]], designated [[Alpha (Advanced Recon Commando)|Alpha-17]], on the mission. During the Jedi's duel with Durge, he mentioned prisoners (spice miners), and Obi-Wan sent Anakin and the ARC trooper to free them.

After that, Glaive was caught off guard, and was decapitated by the Separatist commander, [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. She then dueled with Obi-Wan, apparently using the Dark Side to re-animate dead Gungans to aid her. Meanwhile, Anakin and the ARC trooper successfully freed the prisoners, and destroyed the capsules of the gas that they were being loaded onto spice ships destined for Naboo. They then went back to Obi-Wan, and helped him defeat Ventress. However, the duo managed to escape, though Naboo was safe.
